emails.subject: Form
emails.body: Form Sara, I talked with Brent Hendry late yesterday. He would like to be e-mailed a form template called "Credit Review Sheet" because he is implementing something at his new job similar to what we have. Who would I call to get such a form? Thanks! Becky x37599

emails.subject: RE: Form
emails.body: RE: Form Credit. Tom Moran, Veronica Gonzales or Bjorn Hagelmann. To: Shackleton, Sara

emails.subject: RE: Form
emails.body: Hi, Sara. Brent said that you told him you gave me a copy of the Credit Review Sheet (or Credit Worksheet). I haven't seen one from you. Did you give it to someone else to forward to him? Signed, "Confused at Enron" To: Spencer, Becky
